code:
import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut in_num = false
  mut neg = false
  mut val = 0
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      if in_num
        if neg
          result = list.push(result, 0 - val)
        else
          result = list.push(result, val)
        end
        in_num = false
        neg = false
        val = 0
      end
    else if b == 45 and not in_num
      neg = true
      in_num = true
    else if b >= 48 and b <= 57
      val = val * 10 + (b - 48)
      in_num = true
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if in_num
    if neg
      result = list.push(result, 0 - val)
    else
      result = list.push(result, val)
    end
  end
  result
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let nums = parse_ints(line1)
let target = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
when Some(x)
  x
when None
  0
end

let count = nums.len()
mut found_i = 0 - 1
mut found_j = 0 - 1
mut i = 0
while i < count
  mut j = i + 1
  while j < count
    let a = match nums.get(i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    let b = match nums.get(j)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if a + b == target and found_i == 0 - 1
      found_i = i
      found_j = j
    end
    j = j + 1
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if found_i == 0 - 1
  print("none")
else
  print("found=#{found_i},#{found_j}")
end
